description: Benchmark tests for audit-engine — multi-round convergence/challenge audit orchestration

evals.name: convergence-spec-review
evals.prompt: 审查以下 OpenSpec proposal，找出潜在问题。Proposal 内容：一个用户管理系统，支持注册、登录、密码重置。技术栈是 Node.js + PostgreSQL。proposal 写了功能描述但缺少安全考虑（如密码哈希策略、rate limiting）、缺少错误处理策略、缺少数据库迁移计划。请用 convergence 模式组织多 Agent 审查。
evals.expected_output: 结构化的审计结论，包含 decisions/issues/risks，带 severity 分级
expectations: Should produce structured conclusions with {type, severity, category, scope, summary} format
Should identify missing security considerations as Critical or Major issue
Should identify missing error handling strategy
Should present conclusions in audit report format with verdict

evals.name: challenge-architecture-decision
evals.prompt: 用 challenge 模式审查一个架构决策：项目选择 MongoDB 作为主数据库存储用户订单数据（含事务性操作）。讨论组需要为这个决策辩护，挑战组需要质疑这个选择。
evals.expected_output: 讨论组提案 + 挑战组反对意见 + 合并讨论结果
expectations: Should separate discussion group output from challenge group output
Challenge group should raise valid concerns about MongoDB for transactional data
Should produce a final verdict with convergence status
